name: Grand Style Ground Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef and onions, then drain off any excess grease.
2. Mix together softened cream cheese, chicken soup, and milk in a bowl.
3. Add salt, catsup, and the cooked ground beef to the mixture.
4. Pour the mixture into a 2-quart casserole dish.
5. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
6. Place the biscuits on top of the casserole.
7. Continue baking at 375 degrees Fahrenheit until the biscuits are golden brown.
